---
# title 是主页的页面标题和浏览器标题。
title: "Xingjian Zhou"
# subtitle 在姓名下方标明主要研究方向。
subtitle: "Geometric Analysis"
# full 布局允许主页欢迎区域使用更宽的页面空间。
page-layout: full
# 主页内容较短，因此关闭本页目录。
toc: false
---

<!-- hero 类把这一整块内容显示成 styles.css 中定义的欢迎卡片。 -->
::: {.hero}
## Welcome

I am a mathematics researcher interested in **geometric analysis**, especially the interaction between geometry, partial differential equations, and variational methods.

This website collects my research, publications, curriculum vitae, and mathematical notes.

<!-- .btn 创建按钮外形；primary 是实心主按钮，outline-primary 是描边次按钮。 -->
[Read my notes](notes/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary} [View publications](publications.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
<!-- 三个冒号结束上面开始的 hero 内容容器。 -->
:::

## Research interests

- Geometric partial differential equations
- Minimal surfaces and variational problems
- Curvature and global differential geometry

## About

Add a short biography here: your current institution, position, advisor, and main research themes. You can also add a portrait later with ordinary Markdown image syntax.

## Contact

Add your institutional email and office address here when you are ready to publish them.
